raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/XXXX - Fraudulent purchase made with my Best Buy CitiBank credit card for {$970.00}. 

XX/XX/XXXX - I received a bill for the amount. I checked my account, and noticed the fraudulent charge. 

XX/XX/XXXX - I disputed the transaction online and called CitiBank and was hung up on. 

XX/XX/XXXX - 61 days after my claim, I received a response that the charges were being re-billed to my account, and that I was responsible for the charges. They said 'my card is protected with an embedded chip, and was used at a chip enabled card reader. ' My card does not have a chip, only swipe. 

XX/XX/XXXX - I filed a report with the CFPB, the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency, as well as a police report with XXXX Police Department. 

I did not make any purchases. I have not used my XXXX CitiBank card since XXXX. On the letter it notes " card is protected with an embedded chip and was used at a chip enabled card reader. '' The card in my possession does not have a chip. CitiBank 's investigation 's claims are blatantly false. 

I don't even know what the purchases on XXXX XXXX were as the item is not showing on my account history. I am unable to re-dispute the transaction on my XXXX CitiBank website.
